description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
An unoccupied Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) was traveling east on 13th Street approaching Bryant Street in San Francisco when it was changing 
lanes from the right lane to the middle lane with its left turn signal activated. An SUV (Vehicle 2), also traveling in the same direction in the 
left lane, started to change course to the right towards the middle lane. The right front corner of the SUV struck the left rear of the Zoox 
vehicle. The Zoox vehicle came to a stop after the collision. Shortly after, the Zoox vehicle turned left onto Bryant Street, as did Vehicle 2. 
The Zoox vehicle then pulled over on Bryant Street, but the Vehicle 2 driver did not stop to exchange information. The Zoox vehicle was 
found to have sustained minor damage to the left rear wheel. Police were not called, and no injuries were reported.
Print
Clear Form
